chapter_title.ar: باب حَدِّ الْجَارِيَةِ الصَّغِيرَةِ الَّتِي يَجُوزُ أَنْ تُقَبَّلَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 170 – Limit of the young girl who he is allowed to be kissed

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/371)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/371)
text: قَالَ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ الْجَارِيَةُ الْحُرَّةُ سِتَّ سِنِينَ فَلَا يَنْبَغِي لَكَ أَنْ تُقَبِّلَهَا .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad Bin Sama’at, from someone else, from Aban Bin Usman, from Abdul Rahman Bin Yahya, from Zurara,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the free girl reaches six years, so it is not befitting for you that you kiss her’.
en.sarwar: 2. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Muhammad ibn Sama‘ah from more than one person from Aban ibn ‘Uthman from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn Yahya from Zurarah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When a free girl becomes six years old then it is not proper for you to kiss her.’”
